events.label: assistant
events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`. Bottom line: an anchor point with a guessed (not verified/certified) 5,000-lb rating is a critical fall hazard — OSHA 1926.502(d)(15)/1910.140(c)(13) require a qualified person to certify the anchorage (or engineer a complete system with a 2:1 safety factor) before anyone ties off. Work at height must stop until the anchor and its substrate are verified and documented.
